summary: Completed iteration 3 testing of Lingo Land educational app. All major features working correctly. Backend APIs 100% pass rate (13/13 tests). Frontend word selection issues from iteration 2 have been FIXED. Syllable highlighter, level toggle buttons, and GamePlay level filtering all working correctly.

issues: Letter bubbles may not be visible immediately due to animation - letters are present in DOM but may need scroll or animation to complete

passed_tests: Backend: API root endpoint accessible
Backend: Login with existing user returns token and user
Backend: Login with invalid credentials returns 401
Backend: User registration creates new account
Backend: /auth/me returns user info with valid token
Backend: /auth/me requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: GET /words returns user's words
Backend: POST /words adds new words
Backend: PUT /words/{id}/level updates word level
Backend: POST /game/session saves session and auto-logs activity
Backend: GET /game/sessions returns user's sessions
Backend: POST /learn/meanings returns definitions
Backend: GET /stats returns user statistics
Frontend: Login flow works and redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Dashboard shows correct stats and navigation
Frontend: Learn page word selection WORKING (fixed from iteration 2)
Frontend: Learn page Select All button WORKING
Frontend: LearnSpelling syllable highlighter renders syllables as spans with data-testid
Frontend: LearnSpelling Repeat and Pass buttons work
Frontend: PreGame page level toggle buttons (1,2,3) present with correct data-testid
Frontend: PreGame level toggles are toggleable (on/off)
Frontend: PreGame Start Game button text updates with word and level count
Frontend: PreGame word selection WORKING (fixed from iteration 2)
Frontend: GamePlay with only Level 1 renders SpellingRain only
Frontend: GamePlay correctly does NOT render MeaningMatch when Level 2 not selected
Frontend: GamePlay correctly does NOT render SentenceArchitect when Level 3 not selected
seed_data_creation: Created test user via registration API during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 3 requirements are working. Word selection issues from iteration 2 have been fixed. The syllable highlighter in LearnSpelling.js correctly renders syllables as separate spans with data-testid='syllable-0', 'syllable-1', etc. Level toggle buttons in PreGame.js work correctly and pass selectedLevels to GamePlay.js. GamePlay respects selectedLevels to only render selected level components.

features_verified.login_flow: WORKING - register, login, redirect to dashboard, protected routes
features_verified.syllable_highlighter: WORKING - syllables rendered as spans with sequential highlighting, Repeat/Pass buttons work
features_verified.level_toggle_buttons: WORKING - 3 toggle buttons with correct data-testid, toggleable, button text updates
features_verified.gameplay_level_filtering: WORKING - only selected level components render
features_verified.activity_auto_logging: WORKING - POST /game/session auto-logs to activity_logs collection
